strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching primary stack requirements
Proven AI-agent development experience (MCP, code generators) and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating architectural and collaboration skills
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary backend framework) and Vitest (primary testing framework)
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL in recent roles, though MongoDB and SQL are covered
Secondary stack includes Kotlin/Java but no recent deep dive in enterprise backend services
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js expertise with relevant recent experience in AI-agent development and cloud-native tooling. However, her limited exposure to Nest.js and Vitest (primary stack requirements) slightly reduces immediate fit, though her adaptability and open-source contributions suggest quick ramp-up potential.
